{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190152C234570780E8B97E668E"}"},"total":18},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7129698034615206693","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行，就是有些短，能在写的章数多一些就好，写的不错，看书或听书让人心情很好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660012280,"group_id":"6917994171038960647","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyDegYHirSgimQUevDQ5J8Q=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"85370978028","user_name":"喜欢小雪素的马宽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"85370978028","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6917994171038960647","book_info":{"abstract":"陈雷，无父无母，与师傅相依为命，从小在与世隔绝的药园长大，本性质朴爽直，心底纯善，爱憎分明。药园神秘莫测，满园圣药，更有能刺激药物迅速成熟的仙土和咒语，陈雷常年侍弄药草，不自觉武力强横，满身药性。
成年后被师父赶下山历练，陈雷偷偷带走了药园里的一抔仙土，能迅速的增加药物活性，堪称秘宝。
没有任何社会经验也没有学历的陈雷没法正常找工作，因医术被唐氏医馆收留，与馆主的孙女唐嫣成为欢喜冤家，陈雷毛躁，唐嫣脾气火爆，两人经常互相掐，却渐渐产生了情愫，互相吸引着接近.......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/5363cc3518798008829a48af24723117~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无妄江山","author_id":"","book_id":"6917994171038960647","book_name":"霸道神医","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6931082672894804494","read_count":"27","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1188829"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"584","tags":"都市修真,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/5363cc3518798008829a48af24723117~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447712&x-signature=1XrjjMDhm%2F9PCLK5HdZk5YX2dw4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.794188e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190152C234570780E8B97E668E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16423,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26217,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1021},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7212859859631555361","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，希望大家能够一起阅读"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679374919,"group_id":"6917994171038960647","servic
